profile.name: Dhruv Jain
profile.title: Mobile App Developer | Flutter Specialist
profile.bio: Results-driven Mobile Engineer specializing in high-performance, cross-platform applications using Flutter and Dart. Proven track record of architecting scalable UI/UX, integrating complex REST APIs, and successfully shipping production-grade builds to both the Apple App Store and Google Play. Passionate about delivering fluid, intuitive, and crash-free mobile experiences.

workExperience.description: Engineered cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart, integrating complex RESTful APIs to deliver seamless data synchronization. Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers to translate requirements into interactive prototypes. Managed end-to-end deployment cycles, successfully shipping production builds to the Apple App Store and Google Play.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering
education.description: Advancing expertise in software engineering principles, algorithms, and modern system architecture. Actively applying rigorous academic theory to specialized mobile application development and full-stack performance optimization.

Graduated with High Honors (95.58% aggregate). Specialized in core software programming, algorithmic fundamentals, and acquired the advanced technical groundwork for cross-platform scalable mobile development.

endorsements.name: Digilateral Solutions Team
endorsements.title: Development Team Lead
endorsements.testimonial: Dhruv is a dedicated and quick learner who consistently delivered quality work during his internship. His Flutter development skills and ability to collaborate with the design team made him a valuable asset to our projects.

endorsements.name: Project Mentor
endorsements.title: Senior Mobile Developer
endorsements.testimonial: Working with Dhruv on the Neuro iPad app was excellent. He demonstrated strong technical skills in Flutter and showed great attention to detail in implementing features and integrating analytics.

endorsements.name: Academic Supervisor
endorsements.title: Professor, Computer Engineering
endorsements.testimonial: Dhruv is an exceptional student with outstanding academic performance (95.58%). His passion for mobile development and commitment to learning new technologies sets him apart.

projects.title: Neuro - iPad VA
projects.description: Architected an interactive medical data visualization suite specifically optimized for iPad environments. Integrated robust local data persistence, real-time Sentry.io crash reporting, and Google Analytics to track user engagement.

projects.title: Quiz App
projects.description: Engineered an engagement gamification platform for pharmaceutical representatives. Implemented complex state management, data persistence, and analytics. Successfully navigated Apple's stringent review process via AppStore Connect.

projects.title: dSangeet - Android Music Player
projects.description: Developed a fully-native Android media companion leveraging OS-level background audio services. Implemented advanced permissions handling, local file-system querying, and a custom interactive UI built entirely with Java and raw XML.
